title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MADALANIT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF WRIGHT, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2827 / 51 OG No. 7, 3388 (July, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1312, June 16, 1955 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MADALANIT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF WRIGHT, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Madalanit, in the Municipality of Wright, Province of Samar, is hereby constituted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Madalanit.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1955.
